Spring Data Elasticsearch

    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Terminally Deprecated
    • Packages
    • Classes
    • Methods
    • Terminally Deprecated Elements
      Element
      Description
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.ClientConfiguration.getHostNameVerifier()
      since 6.0
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createImperative(RestClient)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createImperative(RestClient, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createReactive(RestClient)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createReactive(RestClient, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.getElasticsearchTransport(RestClient, String, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version taking a Rest5Client
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
      since 6.0, use ElasticsearchConfiguration
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ReactiveElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
      since 6.0 use ReactiveElasticsearchConfiguration
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client.RestClients
      since 6.0, use the new Rest5Client the code for that is in the package ../rest_client.
    • Deprecated Packages
      Package
      Description
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client
    • Deprecated Classes
      Class
      Description
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
      since 6.0, use ElasticsearchConfiguration
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ReactiveElasticsearchLegacyRestClientConfiguration
      since 6.0 use ReactiveElasticsearchConfiguration
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client.RestClients
      since 6.0, use the new Rest5Client the code for that is in the package ../rest_client.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.ClientConfiguration.getHostNameVerifier()
      since 6.0
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createImperative(RestClient)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createImperative(RestClient, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createReactive(RestClient)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.createReactive(RestClient, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version with a Rest5Client.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.ElasticsearchClients.getElasticsearchTransport(RestClient, String, TransportOptions, JsonpMapper)
      since 6.0, use the version taking a Rest5Client
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.deleteTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.deleteTemplate(DeleteTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.existsTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.existsTemplate(ExistsTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.getTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.getTemplate(GetTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.IndexOperations.putTemplate(PutTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.highlight.HighlightCommonParameters.getForceSource()
      the underlying functionality is deprecated since Elasticsearch 8.8.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.highlight.HighlightCommonParameters.HighlightCommonParametersBuilder.withForceSource(boolean)
      the underlying functionality is deprecated since Elasticsearch 8.8.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.deleteTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.deleteTemplate(DeleteTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.existsTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.existsTemplate(ExistsTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.getTemplate(String)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.getTemplate(GetTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
      org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveIndexOperations.putTemplate(PutTemplateRequest)
      since 5.1, as the underlying Elasticsearch API is deprecated.
